en.kctvDesc: Korean Central Television (KCTV) is the state television broadcaster of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea. It broadcasts news, cultural programs, documentaries, and entertainment content from Pyongyang.
en.kcbsDesc: Korean Central Broadcasting Station (KCBS) is the primary domestic radio network of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea. It broadcasts news, music, and cultural programming to listeners across the Korean peninsula.
en.vokDesc: Voice of Korea (VOK) is the official international broadcasting service of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea. It broadcasts in multiple languages including Korean, English, Chinese, Japanese, and others.
en.cctvDesc: China Central Television (CCTV) is the national television broadcaster of China. CCTV-1 is the flagship channel broadcasting news, documentaries, and entertainment.
en.archivesDesc: Browse and watch recorded broadcasts from Korean Central Television.
en.footer: Juche TV. Not affiliated with any broadcasting entity.
en.disclaimer: The stream is embedded from a third-party provider and may occasionally experience interruptions.
en.embedDesc: Use the code below to embed this live stream on your own website, blog, or platform. The player is fully responsive and will automatically resize to fit its container, making it easy to integrate seamlessly into your existing layout.

zh.kctvDesc: 朝鲜中央电视台（KCTV）是朝鲜民主主义人民共和国的国家电视台。播放来自平壤的新闻、文化节目、纪录片和娱乐内容。
zh.kcbsDesc: 朝鲜中央广播电台（KCBS）是朝鲜民主主义人民共和国的主要国内广播网络。向朝鲜半岛各地的听众播放新闻、音乐和文化节目。
zh.vokDesc: 朝鲜之声（VOK）是朝鲜民主主义人民共和国官方国际广播服务机构。以多种语言广播，包括朝鲜语、英语、中文、日语等。
zh.cctvDesc: 中国中央电视台（CCTV）是中国的国家电视台。央视综合频道是旗舰频道，播放新闻、纪录片和娱乐节目。
zh.archivesDesc: 浏览和观看朝鲜中央电视台的录制节目。
zh.footer: 主体电视。与任何广播实体无关。
zh.disclaimer: 流媒体由第三方提供商嵌入，可能偶尔会出现中断。
zh.embedDesc: 您可以使用以下代码将此直播嵌入您自己的网站、博客或平台。播放器具有完全自适应布局，会根据容器自动调整大小，方便您轻松整合到现有页面中。
